data.content: Implementation complete on branch ab20/create-draft-persistence (d6ea6656529b). All 6 acceptance criteria met: (1) Form values persisted to localStorage on each input change via form.watch() subscription and useEffect for blocks/blockedBy. (2) Persisted values restored when dialog reopens by loading draft in useBeatForm and merging with defaults. (3) Clear button added in lower-left of BeatFormActions with variant=outline. (4) Clear resets form via formKey increment and removes localStorage data. (5) clearDraft() called in both handleFormSubmit and handleCreateMoreClick before onSubmit. (6) No new dependencies — uses native localStorage. Extracted ProfileInfoDialog and FormField into separate files to stay under 500-line limit. All quality gates pass: lint (warning only — React Compiler skip on form.watch, pre-existing pattern), tsc --noEmit clean, 201 test files / 2330 tests passing, build succeeds.
